hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|html)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/frontend/'; then cd /home/darius/dev/ai-generated/enclave-station/frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

cd /home/darius/dev/ai-generated/enclave-station && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^frontend/' && echo '⚠ Frontend files changed — verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck (from frontend/)' || true
